name: Stripe
description: Access your Stripe account to look up customers, list payments and charges, and retrieve invoice data using the Stripe REST API.

auth.hint: Use your Stripe Secret Key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) from the Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API Keys.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List Stripe customers. Returns email, name, creation date, and balance.

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Get a specific customer's profile, balance, and metadata.

tools.name: list_payment_intents
tools.description: List recent payment intents with their amount, currency, status, and creation date.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices for your account or a specific customer.

params.name: customer
params.description: Stripe customer ID to filter by

params.name: status
params.description: Invoice status: draft, open, paid, void, or uncollectible

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get the current balance of your Stripe account including available and pending amounts.
